name: 3" x 4" Unscented Candle White - Room Essentials™: Paraffin Wax, 65hr Burn Time, Single Wick Pillar
description:
Light up your space with the 3" x 4" Fragrance Free Candle White from Room Essentials™. This unscented candle is great for setting a minimal, bright ambiance. Crafted from paraffin wax, it's designed to go on for longer with an approximate burn time of 65 hours. With a single wick, this pillar candle is ideal for setting the table for dinner parties or enjoying a quiet night in.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
